name: verdictcouncil-promptfoo-tests
description: Promptfoo evals for VerdictCouncil phase prompts (lecturer-style, deterministic only)

scripts.eval: npm run eval:intake && npm run eval:research-evidence && npm run eval:research-facts && npm run eval:research-law && npm run eval:research-witnesses && npm run eval:synthesis && npm run eval:audit
scripts.validate: npx promptfoo@latest validate -c intake.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c research-evidence.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c research-facts.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c research-law.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c research-witnesses.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c synthesis.yaml && npx promptfoo@latest validate -c audit.yaml
